---
title: "About the UConn Health HPC"
---

The facility provides free access to over 300 TeraFLOPS of compute power, 10,000 processor cores and over 14 PB of storage housed in a secure, state of the art data center supported 24/7 by a dedicated staff of professionals.

# Mantis Cluster

# Xanadu Cluster

# Storage

# Virtual Machines
